args:
python3 - <<'PY'
import struct
b=open('enc.db','rb').read()
pos=8
uc=struct.unpack_from('<I',b,pos)[0]; pos+=4
for _ in range(uc):
    l=struct.unpack_from('<I',b,pos)[0]; pos+=4+l+16
    vl=struct.unpack_from('<I',b,pos)[0]; pos+=4+vl
users_end=pos
out=bytearray(b[:users_end])
out += struct.pack('<I',1)
out += struct.pack('<I',5) + b'user1'
out += struct.pack('<I',5) + b'file1'
out += b'\x00'
open('enc.db','wb').write(out)
PY
